description: A highly stylized digital artwork in gold and blue tones, framed by an ornate golden border. Two abstract female figures are rendered in flowing, decorative forms — one in warm gold tones on the left, one in cooler purple-blue tones on the right. Small blue butterfly or flower motifs float between them. The composition is symmetrical and decorative, with the figures appearing almost as ornamental vase or vessel shapes. A watermark reading the artist's name is visible.
